categories.name: Personal
categories.description: Skills available in every project, invoked on demand for personal productivity workflows.

categories.name: Project
categories.description: Skills committed to a specific project's repo, shared with anyone working in it.

categories.name: Cursor Built-in
categories.description: Skills Cursor itself ships as built-in product features, distinct from anything the user authored.

categories.name: Plugins
categories.description: Skills bundled inside marketplace plugins installed into Cursor's plugin cache.

categories.name: Frontend
categories.description: Skills committed to the Saporo-SA/frontend repo, shared with anyone working in it.

categories.name: On-Prem
categories.description: Skills committed to (or shared into) the Saporo-SA/on-prem repo, shared with anyone working in it.
